mapper.sql: ar.id AS review_id, ar.question_id, ar.review_status, ar.retry_count, qs.challenge_date, p.title AS passage_title, p.topic AS passage_topic, q.position AS question_position, q.content AS question_content, selected_option.id AS selected_option_id, selected_option.position AS selected_option_position, selected_option.content AS selected_option_content, correct_option.id AS correct_option_id, correct_option.position AS correct_option_position, correct_option.content AS correct_option_content, qk.explanation, qk.evidence, ar.created_at, ar.last_reviewed_at, ar.recovered_at

FROM answer_reviews ar JOIN questions q ON q.id = ar.question_id JOIN passages p ON p.id = q.passage_id JOIN quiz_sets qs ON qs.id = p.quiz_set_id JOIN attempt_answers aa ON aa.attempt_id = ar.source_attempt_id AND aa.question_id = ar.question_id JOIN question_options selected_option ON selected_option.id = aa.selected_option_id JOIN question_keys qk ON qk.question_id = ar.question_id JOIN question_options correct_option ON correct_option.id = qk.correct_option_id
mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE ar.user_id = #{userId}
AND ar.review_status IN ('PENDING', 'REVIEWED')
AND ar.review_status = 'RECOVERED'
ORDER BY CASE ar.review_status WHEN 'RECOVERED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, qs.challenge_date DESC, ar.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE answer_reviews SET review_status = #{status}, retry_count = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'RECOVERED' AND review_status != 'RECOVERED' THEN retry_count + 1 ELSE retry_count END, last_reviewed_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'RECOVERED' THEN CAST(#{reviewedAt} AS TIMESTAMPTZ) ELSE last_reviewed_at END, recovered_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'RECOVERED' THEN CAST(#{reviewedAt} AS TIMESTAMPTZ) ELSE CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMPTZ) END, updated_at = CAST(#{reviewedAt} AS TIMESTAMPTZ) WHERE id = #{reviewId} AND user_id = #{userId}
